summary: A clip from a local news segment. A graphic with the header ARRESTED displays a booking-style photo of a man with a beard, captioned with the name Willie Escobar. A News 6 / Oklahoma's Own logo and a time-and-temperature readout appear in the lower corners with a headline ticker along the bottom.

script.scene: A graphic headed ARRESTED shows a booking photo captioned Willie Escobar.
The same graphic remains displayed with the News 6 logo.
Continued display of the arrest graphic.

notable_text: ARRESTED; Willie Escobar; Oklahoma's Own; News 6
